name: lockx-zk-circuits
description: Zero-knowledge circuits for Lockx privacy features

scripts.compile:all: npm run compile:deposit && npm run compile:withdraw && npm run compile:transfer
scripts.setup:deposit: snarkjs groth16 setup build/deposit.r1cs ptau/pot20_final.ptau build/deposit_0000.zkey
scripts.setup:withdraw: snarkjs groth16 setup build/withdraw.r1cs ptau/pot20_final.ptau build/withdraw_0000.zkey
scripts.setup:transfer: snarkjs groth16 setup build/transfer.r1cs ptau/pot20_final.ptau build/transfer_0000.zkey
scripts.contribute:deposit: snarkjs zkey contribute build/deposit_0000.zkey build/deposit_0001.zkey --name="Lockx contribution" -v
scripts.contribute:withdraw: snarkjs zkey contribute build/withdraw_0000.zkey build/withdraw_0001.zkey --name="Lockx contribution" -v
scripts.contribute:transfer: snarkjs zkey contribute build/transfer_0000.zkey build/transfer_0001.zkey --name="Lockx contribution" -v
scripts.export:all: npm run export:deposit && npm run export:withdraw && npm run export:transfer
scripts.build: npm run compile:all && npm run setup:all && npm run contribute:all && npm run export:all
